title: Ibrahim Mod (FINAL UPDATE)
description:
The mod I made for my friends available in English and Turkish.

it adss things like diamond doors, roblox dimension, multitools, troll face bossfight and much more.

download this mod if you want more chaos!

made with MCreator
body:
a cursed low quality mod i made for my friend. it adds things like 4 new dimensions, 9 new bosses, 12 new swords, new blocks with new mechanics(diamond doors, emerald generator, etc.), new tools(including literal firearms) and more.
Download this crappy mod if you want more chaos!

![some of the mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28b43112d6fbe949301abc0645240613a3b04a1c.png)

![some of the items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf160112865b5aa5c434903aa1658ab616f48ac5.png)

![naturally generated dirt diamond ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f13e0cc28ddd08c3f47eb50e2051dc8f37d4e61.png)

![Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffb9ff9747d1ae3a4b54291f931b9a18c4af52b1.png)


made with mcreator.

mod supports two languages: English(US) and Türkçe(TR)
